description_long: This is a medium-sized, square-tapered trash bin with a clean, modern design, primarily colored in a light gray or white tone. The front face prominently displays a green recycling symbol, indicating its intended use for recyclable materials. The bin has a wide, open top for easy disposal of waste, with no visible lid or covering mechanism. Its smooth, hard surface suggests it is made from molded plastic, which is common for urban recycling bins due to durability and ease of cleaning. There are no visible handles, wheels, or additional features, giving it a minimalist appearance. The interior is hollow, designed to contain waste, and the base is slightly thicker for stability.
description: A light gray, square-tapered recycling bin with a green recycling symbol on the front and an open top. The design is minimalist, with smooth plastic surfaces and no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green recycling symbol on a smooth, light gray surface with an open top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain, smooth surface with no markings or features, and the open top is visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the side, with a plain, unmarked surface and open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and unmarked, matching the other non-front faces.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: green recycling symbol on the front
